theme.name: Neo-Brutalist Play
theme.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalist contrast
theme.rationale: The user requested an 'eye-catching and not dull and bland' aesthetic for a gig economy app. A Neo-Brutalist approach with vibrant pastels, thick black outlines, and hard shadows provides a highly energetic, trustworthy, and modern vibe that breaks away from boring corporate utility apps.

rules: Headings MUST be thick and tight.
Never center text by default; use left alignment for strong vertical rhythm.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing combined with stark, chunky containers.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-lg (if rounded, max 8px for brutalist feel)

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B6B] text-black font-black border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#000000] py-4 px-6 uppercase active:translate-y-1 active:translate-x-1 active:shadow-none
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFE66D] text-black font-black border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#000000] py-4 px-6 uppercase active:translate-y-1 active:translate-x-1 active:shadow-none

components.inputs: bg-white border-2 border-black p-4 text-base font-medium focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-[#FF6B6B] focus-within:shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#000000]
components.badges: bg-[#4ECDC4] text-black border-2 border-black px-3 py-1 font-bold text-xs uppercase

motion.interactions: Physical and tactile. Buttons press down physically (translate X and Y, remove shadow). Lists stagger in.

abstract_patterns.description: Geometric pattern with coral, blue, and orange shapes (Use as Hero/Header background)
Stylized geometric pattern with repeating motifs (Use for onboarding screens)
Abstract geometric pattern with red circles and yellow shapes (Use for empty states)

instructions_to_main_agent: Use NativeWind or manual StyleSheet to replicate Tailwind classes provided in the design guidelines.

Do NOT use generic rounded borders with soft shadows. Strictly adhere to hard black borders (borderWidth: 2, borderColor: '#000') and hard offset shadows (shadowColor: '#000', shadowOffset: { width: 4, height: 4 }, shadowOpacity: 1, shadowRadius: 0).
For the 'Verified Badge', use a bold blue or mint green with a checkmark icon, retaining the hard outline.
Use standard BottomTab navigation with thick black top borders.
Ensure all interactive elements have a 'testID' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming.
Never use placeholder image services (like via.placeholder.com). ONLY use the media URLs provided in this JSON.
For icons, use lucide-react-native if possible, keeping strokeWidth heavy (e.g., 2.5 or 3).

Since this is React Native Expo, translate the neo-brutalist tailwind instructions into React Native StyleSheet properties carefully (e.g., shadow behaviors vary between iOS and Android, so apply elevation for Android along with border tricks).
